name: observability
trigger_condition: Task involves logging, metrics, token tracking, alerts, or dashboards
description: Observability skills: structured logging (SQLite/file), token usage tracking, latency metrics, error pattern analysis, alert routing (Telegram), session artifact management, status reporting, health checks.
expected_output: Observable code with logging, metrics, and reporting
known_limitations: Telegram alerts require TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN; token tracking depends on LLM provider support
